notes: ik_llama.cpp local server profile. Model served by an ik_llama.cpp Docker container on localhost:8000 with an OpenAI-compatible /v1 endpoint and a custom llamacpp provider in the generated benchmark config.

models.label: Qwen 3.6 35B A3B Q8 (ik_llama.cpp localhost)
models.selection_reason: Remote-provider-style benchmark of Qwen 3.6 35B A3B Q8 served by an ik_llama.cpp Docker container on localhost:8000. Treated like any other cloud provider; the local opencode config is generated by run_benchmark.sh. Skipped by default because it requires a third-party local backend.
